'''Yang Fire Horse''' is the 43rd of the sixty nodes of the [[Sexagenary cycle|Divine Sixty]], the great cycle that the [[Heavenly stems|heavenly stems]] and [[Earthly Branches|earthly branches]] trace across the ringworld's calendar of [[Gaia]] and [[Luna]].

Its stem is 丙 Hinoe (yang fire, the gaia-aligned face of summer), and its branch is 午 Uma, the [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse]] hour. Within the [[Wuxing]] reading of the node, both stem and branch share the fire element, doubling its weight in this node.

On the [[The divine 60|Divine Sixty]] lattice this position falls between [[Yin Wood Snake]] (node 42) and [[Yin Fire Goat]] (node 44).

== Folk reading ==
Yang Fire Horse is the most feared node of the cycle in folk belief. Girls born under this combination are said to grow strong-willed enough to overshadow their husbands; births deliberately registered in adjacent years are common, and ringworld demographic records show clear dips at every Yang Fire Horse year.

== Stem and branch ==
* '''Stem:''' [[Hinoe (丙)]] — yang fire
* '''Branch:''' [[Horse (zodiac)|Horse (午)]] — yang fire
* '''Celestial body:''' [[Gaia]]
* '''Element-season:''' summer

== See also ==
* [[The divine 60]]
* [[Sexagenary cycle]]
* [[Heavenly stems]]
* [[Earthly Branches]]
* [[Yin Wood Snake]] — preceding node
* [[Yin Fire Goat]] — following node

{{wikidata link|Q1062045}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Ringworld]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
